title: India as the arbitration hub: The conversation is the problem
description: There is a particular genre of conference speech that has become familiar at arbitration weeks and at every gathering of the international arbitration community where India features on the agenda. Practitioners take the podium and conclude with some variant of the observation that India has tremendous potential but still has work to do. And when the conference ends, very little changes.The proposition that India can or should become an international arbitration hub is, at its core, a category er
